songs.title: Uptight
feed: “Uptight” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.

“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 33 sales units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 203,490 total units.
